title: cupaniopsis punctulata
intro: Cupaniopsis punctulata, commonly known as the Australian Bead Tree, is a plant species native to Australia. The health benefits of Cupaniopsis punctulata include its potential in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of the plant are attributed to its flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The bioactive constituents of Cupaniopsis punctulata include flavonoids such as kaempferol and quercetin, alkaloids like berberine, and phenolic compounds like gallic acid, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Cupaniopsis punctulata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its toxic compounds.
